task_completion.description: Open BlueMail and view the mailbox folders.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The BlueMail application window is visible, displaying the folder list (Inbox, Junk, Drafts, Sent, Trash).

task_completion.description: Create a plain-text report at the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is open showing a file named 'mailbox_health_report.txt' saved in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

task_completion.description: Include all required metrics in the plain-text report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text report contains email counts for the 5 required folders, the total email count, at least 3 frequent sender domains or mailing lists, and an approximate date range.

task_completion.description: Draft an email with the correct recipient and subject.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A compose window in BlueMail is open with the 'To' field set to 'ops-director@company.com' and the 'Subject' field set to 'Quarterly Mailbox Health Report'.

task_completion.description: Include the total email count and junk volume in the drafted email body.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The body of the drafted email in BlueMail explicitly mentions the total email count and the junk volume (or junk email count).

integrity.description: The agent used the BlueMail GUI to view the mailbox rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the BlueMail application interface to read emails and counts, without terminal commands like 'ls' or 'grep' on the Maildir.

integrity.description: The email draft is created in the BlueMail application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The email composition window clearly belongs to the BlueMail application, not a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The metrics in the report and draft email are genuine.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report and draft email contain actual numbers for counts and actual domain names for senders, rather than generic placeholders or copied task instructions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The plain-text report must be saved at '/home/ga/Documents/mailbox_health_report.txt'. The required folders to analyze are inbox, junk, drafts, sent, and trash. The drafted email must be addressed to 'ops-director@company.com'. The count tolerance for evaluation is 10.
